output.code:
# Let's load the file
path = '/mnt/data/file-SmT3VFnTdrVe1wom6V9rCg-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:200], text[-200:]

# find the colon after 'قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم:'
phrase = 'قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم:'
idx = text.find(phrase)
idx, text[idx:idx+len(phrase)+10]

colon_idx = idx + len(phrase) - 1
colon_char = text[colon_idx]
# matn start is char after colon, skip spaces
start = colon_idx + 1
# skip spaces and any whitespace
while start < len(text) and text[start].isspace():
    start += 1
# matn end is end of text (strip trailing whitespace)
end = len(text)
while end > start and text[end-1].isspace():
    end -= 1

start, end, text[start:start+20], repr(text[start:start+20]), repr(text[end-20:end])
